name: io.studiomeyer/geo
title: StudioMeyer GEO
description: AI visibility monitoring with 24 tools + 5 expert workflows. Check how 8 LLM platforms (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, Grok, DeepSeek, Meta AI, Copilot) see your brand. Page-type-aware content audit, sitemap-first content freshness, entity consistency with email/URL/domain masking, retrieval quality (text-to-HTML, JS dependency, canonical chains), hallucination guard. 20 tools free without API keys. Magic Link email verification — no passwords. EU hosted (Frankfurt).
